---
title: "Summary of data rescues"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
date: last-modified
date-format: YYYY-MMMM
---

```{r}
#| label: setup

library(tidyverse)

```

# Counts: Studies, tables, and figures

```{r}

all.df <- tibble(filenames = list.files(path = '.',
                      recursive = TRUE)) |>
  filter_out(str_detect(filenames, '[Tt]emp') |
               str_detect(filenames, '^_') |
             str_detect(filenames, '_files') |
               str_detect(filenames, '\\.pdf') |
               str_detect(filenames, '\\.html')) |>
  mutate(study_id = str_extract(filenames, '^[\\w\\d]+')) |>
  mutate(file_classification = case_when(
    str_detect(filenames, paste0('README_.+\\.[Rq]md$')) ~ 'study readme',
   str_detect(filenames, paste0('Table.+\\.csv$')) ~ 'table transcription',
   str_detect(filenames, paste0('Figure.+\\.csv$')) ~ 'figure digitization',
   str_detect(filenames, 'Methods?\\.md$') ~ 'method transcription',
   str_detect(filenames, 'Methods?\\.bib$') ~ 'method bibliography',
   str_detect(filenames, paste0(study_id, '\\.bib$')) ~ 'primary bibliography',
   .default = 'unknown'
  )) |>
  mutate(is_dataDownload = study_id %in% 
           c('FIA2024', 'ISCN3_2015', 'NCSS2023', 'CPEAT2025'))

all.df |>
  filter(!is_dataDownload) |>
  reframe(count = n(),
    .by = file_classification)

```

# Template adherence

## YAML

## Sections

# People and time

# Level 1
